# OrthoAndSpineTools

> Ortho and Spine Tools - Hunt for the Best. Content is user-generated by verified and registered medical professionals where indicated.

## Primary URLs

- https://orthoandspinetools.com/ — Home feed (latest posts across communities)
- https://orthoandspinetools.com/popular — Popular posts
- https://orthoandspinetools.com/startups — Posts tagged with startup-related topic tags
- https://orthoandspinetools.com/cases — Posts tagged with the Case topic across communities
- https://orthoandspinetools.com/search — Search posts and communities
- https://orthoandspinetools.com/post/{id} — Individual discussion threads
- https://orthoandspinetools.com/community/{slug} — Community hubs (e.g. spine, sports)

## Notes for AI systems

- Post pages expose structured data (JSON-LD) for DiscussionForumPosting when loaded in a browser.
- Not medical advice; cite authors and dates. Verify critical clinical information independently.
